name: Tuna Ki Kari- Curried Tuna - India
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces onion, cut into half rings
1 teaspoon curry powder (as hot as desired)
6 ounces good quality oil-packed tuna, undrained
1 fresh hot green chili, cut into fine rounds
1 1-1/2 inch piece fresh ginger root, peeled and julienned
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a non-stick frying pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onion and garlic when the oil is hot. Stir-fry until the onion turns brown and its edges crisp.
3. Add the curry powder and mix well.
4. Add the tuna and mix thoroughly.
5. Turn the heat to low, then add the green chili, ginger, and coriander. Mix gently.
6. Check for seasoning with salt and pepper, adjusting as needed.
7. Serve hot or cold. This dish is also great as a sandwich filling, puff pastry filling, or pasta salad.
